ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.

ElementDescription: Sex of subject at birth
Notes: M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Please indicate who is answering the questions for this survey:
Notes: 1 = Biological Mother; 3 = Legal Guardian

ElementDescription: Since coming home from the hospital, has your baby always lived with you?
Notes: 0= No; 1= Yes; -77= Do not know; -88= Do not wish to answer; -99= Missing

ElementDescription: Including the current residence(s), how many different locations has your baby lived during their first year of life?
Notes: Number of locations; 5= 5 or more; -77= Do not know; -88= Do not wish to answer; -99= Missing

ElementDescription: What is your current marital status?
Notes: 1= Single/never married; 2= Married; 3= Widowed; 4= Separated; 5= Divorced; 6= Living with a partner/spouse; -77= Do not know; -88 Do not wish to answer; -99= Missing

ElementDescription: What is your current employment status?
Notes: 1= Employed Full-time; 2= Employed part-time; 3= Self-employed; 6= A student; 7= Military; 8= Unable to work; 9= Other; 10= Not working outside the home and looking for work; 11= Not working outside of the home, but not currently looking for work; -77= Do not know; -88 Do not wish to answer; -99= Missing
